goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'north'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'french' food and should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'restaurant' by '02:15'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the north
The hotel should have a star of 3
Make sure you get price range and phone number
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve french food and should be in the same area as the hotel
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the restaurant by 02:15
Make sure you get contact number and car type
